calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Duplicate entry.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, CSR: Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner Catalina Hernandez, Mother of the minor present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name of minor to: Ebert Ronaldo Gonzalez.
Decree signed in open court.
